verses.text: Khrih in eite hong khahkhiat khitna hangin mi suaktate hi khinta ihih manin tua suahtakna thu-ah kipin om un la, sila va suakkik nawn kei un
Tu-in keimah Paul in ka hong gen ding thu limtakin na ngai un: Note in vun-atna na zat uh leh note-a' dingin Khrih' nasepna a kiman'na a om hetlo ahi hi
Vun-atna a zang mi khempeuh in Thukham dang khempeuh zong a vekpi-in a zuihding a tavuan ahihna thu teltakin phawk ta uh hen
Thukham zuihna hangin Pasian tawh kipawl theihna ding a hanciamte pen Khrih tawh a kikhen na hi uh a, Pasian' hehpihna in note hong huam theilo hi
Kote ahih leh Pasian in amah tawh a kipawlthei dingin hong bawl ding hi, ci-in lamenin, kote' upna hangin Kha Siangtho' vangliatna tawh hong piangding hi, ci-in a om ka hi uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Jesuh Khrih tawh i kipawl ciangin vun-atna leh vun-atlohna a thupi tuan omlo a, Khrih i upna hangin midangte i itna a thupi hi bek hi
A beisa hunah hoihtakin a gamtate na hi uh hi. Tu-in a manin na gamtatlohna dingun kua in lam hong pialsakin Pasian' thu hong manglosak ahi hiam
Note a hong sam Pasian in note na pialna dingun hong zolkhia hetlo ding hi
Silngo themno khat in annel lom buppi tawk thei hi, na kici hi

Eite, Topa tawh a kipawl khawmte ihih manin kei tawh a kilamdangin note in bangmah ngaihsut tuam nei hetlo ding, ci-in ka hong muang a, a kua a kua hita leh note hong nawngkaisakte pen Pasian in gim pia ding hi, ci-in ka um hi

Sanggamte aw, vun-atna kisam hi, ci-in a hilh lai hi leng, bang hangin bawlsiatna thuak zenzen ding ka hi hiam? Tua bangin thu a hilh hi leng, singlamteh tunga Khrih' sihna thu ka hilhna hangin bangmah buaina a om kei ding hi
No hong lungkhamsak mite in a maban uh nawtsuak uh hen la, a ut leh a pasal nateng nangawn uh atkhia mangkhin vet uh hen

Sanggamte aw, note ahih leh a suakta mi ahi dingin Pasian in a hong sap ahi hi. Ahi zongin tua suahtakna pen na pumpi uh ut bangbangin gamtat theihna dingin paulam zon'na-in nei kei un la, itna tawh khatlekhat kikhualna-in zangzaw un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Thukham khempeuh thu khatin kigawm thei a, “Nangmah na ki-it bangin na vengte na it in,” cihna tawh kilomlak thei hi
Ahi zongin note pen gamsa bangin khatlekhat kiphuai-in kipetkha le uh cin na vekpi-un na siatlawhkhak ding uh lauhuai ahih manin hoihtakin na kidawm un.

sections.sectionTitle: Kha Siangtho' deih banga Nuntakna leh Mihing' Deih banga Nuntakna

verses.text: Note kiangah ka hong gen thu in: Kha Siangtho' hong sawlna bangin gamta un la, na pumpi uh utna bangin gamta kei un

Bang hang hiam cih leh ei' pumpi ut bangin gamta lehang Kha Siangtho' deihna tawh na kituaklo a, Kha Siangtho' deihna bangin gamta lehang ei' pumpi deihna tawh na kituaklo zel ahih manin hih nihte gel a kilangpang niloh na hi a, note' ut bangin a gamta theilo na hi uh hi
Kha Siangtho' deihna bangin na gamtat uh leh Thukham khutnuai-ah na om nawn kei uh hi
Tu-in mihing pianzia hong kitel a, tuate pen: Numei tawh mawhna, thangtatna, lanluat mana khialhna
milim biakna, mi bumna, kilangbawlna, kitotna, hazatna, hehna, huaihamna, kikhenna, pawltuam lungsim neihna

en'na, zukhamna, leh biakna pawi-ah zukhamna-a kipan adangdangte ahi hi. A beisa hunah ka hong hilhkholhsa bangin tu-in ka hong genkikin-ah: Hih bangin a gamta mite pen Pasian' Ukna sungah omkha hetlo ding hi
Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho' sawlna bangin gamtatnate pen: Itna, lungdamna, lungnopna, lungduaina, migitna, hoihna, cihtakna
dikna, leh pumpi ki-ukzawhna hi a, hih bangin a gamta mite, Thukham in bangmah cih theilo hi
Tua hi a, Jesuh Khrih a zui mite in a leitung lungsim pianzia uh leh a leitung lungsim deihna khempeuh uh a phiat khitsa ahi hi
Kha Siangtho in eite hong nungtasak khinta ahih manin ama hong sawlna bangin eite a nungta ding ihi hi
Kuamah kiphasak loin, khatlekhat kiphin loin, kuamah i kihaza kei ding hi.
